entries.title: Full self-host roadmap M1-M5 — runtime.c + Rust driver 완전 탈피
entries.progress_note: M2/M3/M4/M5-대부분 완료. 남은 것: M1 full split + M5 CI 3-플랫폼. 검증일: 2026-04-24. (a) M2 builtin mangling: `grep -c '^#define.*hx_' self/runtime.c == 0` — anima 통과 기준 달성. wrapper fn + hx_setenv/hx_exec_capture HexaVal 초기화 방식으로 교체 완료. (b) M3 argv 정규화: main.hexa / tool/*.hexa 전역 landed. (c) M4 codegen 메서드: .pad_start/.pad_end/.char_at/.char_code_at + merge_modules_awk fix 모두 done (commits 388eece8, 9fef570b, 2a6855ae 등). (d) M5 Linux CLI: tool/build_hexa_cli_linux.hexa 작동 — build/hexa_linux 508KB static ELF, musl x86_64. (e) M5 implicit run: self/main.hexa:2331 ends_with_dot_hexa 분기 live. 검증: `./hexa /tmp/hello.hexa arg1 arg2` PASS. (f) M5 execvp: runtime.c:2848 execvp(argv[0], argv) live (exec_replace 헬퍼). (g) M5 Rust탈피: find ./tool ./self ./.github -name '*.rs' == 0, bench/rust_baseline/ 만 잔존(벤치 baseline, CLI 경로 아님). M1-lite Step 1~2 landed (self/runtime_hi.hexa 142줄, 5 str-fn). 남은 block: M1-lite Step 3 (codegen symbol remap rt_str_* → hexa_str_*) + M1 full 260 fn 이관 + M5 CI 3-플랫폼 workflow. 상세: docs/runtime_audit_20260423.md · docs/next_session_self_host_m1_m5.md. [UPDATE 2026-04-24 session2] M1-lite Step 1~5 전부 CLOSED — self/runtime_hi.hexa str-fn 이관 + codegen symbol remap (rt_str_* → hexa_str_*) landed, runtime.c 대응 엔트리 제거, fixpoint 유지. M5 CI 3-플랫폼 workflow 완료: linux/macos-x64/macos-arm64 10/10 green (GA). 원 scope 중 남은 것은 M1 full split 1건 — runtime.c 265 fn (hexa_file_* / hexa_str_ext_* / hexa_array_* / hexa_map_* / json / base64 / socket 도메인) self/runtime_*.hexa 로 incremental 이관 + runtime_core.c ≤500 LOC 목표. multi-session 작업이므로 user_status=in_progress 유지. 다음 세션 진입점: 도메인별 incremental (file → str_ext → array → map → json → b64 → socket 순 권장).

entries.title: to_int(str) silent-fallback on invalid input (T24/T34)
entries.done_note: AOT codegen for to_int/int now routes TAG_STR through hexa_str_parse_int (throws on invalid) instead of bare atoll. runtime.c:hexa_str_parse_int checks endptr for full consume; empty/whitespace-only input still returns 0 (preserves 812 callsite defensive fallback). hexa_throw: uncaught errors now print the HexaVal string to stderr. Regression.hexa T24/T34 both PASS. 11/16 -> 13/16. Direct stage0 path (HEXA_CACHE=0) was already correct via interpreter exec_throw.

entries.title: comptime { expr } not parseable as expression (T26)
entries.done_note: parse_primary in both self/parser.hexa and self/hexa_full.hexa now accepts Comptime keyword + { expr } → ComptimeExpr wrapper AST. codegen_c2.hexa gen2_expr folds via comptime_eval when possible else falls through to gen2_expr(inner). hexa_full.hexa eval_expr_inner: transparent runtime eval of inner. Tested: AOT+direct paths both print 3 for let x = comptime { 1 + 2 }. regression.hexa 13/16 -> 14/16.

entries.title: module_loader selftest AOT regression — array[9] tag=3 (T36)
entries.done_note: runtime.c hexa_index_get now routes TAG_STR container + int key through hexa_str_char_at (returns 1-char string). Previously fell through to hexa_array_get and aborted with array[N]: container is not an array (tag=3). module_loader.hexa:ml_dirname path[i] was the trigger. Direct stage0 path was fine (interpreter string-index). regression.hexa: 14/16 -> 15/16 PASS (only skip remains).

entries.title: tool/hx_lock.hexa: route raw_all spawn via airgenome bin/executor.sh (AG6 Mac Compute ZERO 준수)
entries.done_note: no-op / already AG6 compliant. Investigation: (1) AG6 enforcer (airgenome/modules/filters/process/compute.hexa L207-209) explicitly scopes to processes running from /core/airgenome/ path — 'hexa-lang self-test, void build 등 타 프로젝트 compute 는 침해 금지'. raw_all spawned via ./build/hexa_stage0 tool/raw_all.hexa runs under /core/hexa-lang/ → deliberately out of AG6 enforcement scope. (2) Routing raw_all via executor.sh with kind=compute would dispatch to ubu1 (current dispatch_state selection) via SSH — breaking semantics because raw_all reads local .raw/.own rules and local tool scripts; remote host lacks the tree unless synced, and stdout/exit-code streaming adds failure modes for a purely local linter/attestation gate. (3) No existing hexa-lang tool uses executor.sh (grep confirms). Introducing this would be anti-pattern, contradicting AG6 author's explicit scope comment. Decision: proposal premise is over-broad; raw_all is excluded by design, not by oversight. hx_lock selftest green (baseline preserved). No commit, no file change. Counter-proposal path if stricter enforcement desired: amend AG6 scope in airgenome/rules/airgenome.json to include hexa-lang, AND add local-fallback branch in executor.sh that honors dispatch_state=local when cwd is hexa-lang tree — but that's an airgenome-side change, not hexa-lang hx_lock.hexa.

entries.title: tool/raw_all.hexa: per-rule enforcer dispatch metadata (mac-only vs remote-able)
entries.done_note: dispatch_tag whitelist + 26 rules tagged (4 mac-only, 22 remote-able). Commit 4a5dc42c (worktree). No loader changes — keys_first() reads as-is. raw_all 37/38 worktree baseline preserved (raw#1 FAIL is uchg-env artifact, no regression). Remaining rules (raw#4/14/16/17/26-30) intentionally untagged within prio=5 scope.

entries.title: go_shadow.hexa: project dir resolution still assumes $HOME/Dev/<project> — needs project-root registry
entries.priority_reason: local_only, non-blocker (nexus path drift fixed; residual assumption only affects run_loop_dry for non-nexus projects)
entries.note: Patched 2026-04-24: harness/ path drift resolved in /Users/ghost/core/nexus/tool/go_shadow.hexa (HARNESS_DIR removed; nexus pieces under NEXUS_TOOL; rmengine/adapter under HEXA_LANG with env override). Remaining: run_loop_dry() still uses HOME + /Dev/ + project for per-project cwd. Works on this host because /Users/ghost/Dev/nexus symlinks to /Users/ghost/core/nexus, but other projects may not mirror. Future fix: project_root(project) helper reading from a central registry (config/projects.json) so go_shadow does not hard-code the $HOME/Dev/ layout.
entries.done_note: Fixed in nexus commit 205697d1: run_loop_dry resolver prefers /Users/ghost/core/<project> (env CORE_ROOT override) + falls back to \$HOME/Dev/<project> for legacy; clean loop_error on dir miss. anima smoke: cd error leak gone, shadow_log row logged.

entries.done_note: stdlib/json_object.hexa 추가 — json_parse_object, json_object_entries, json_object_get_path, typed default getters (get_str/int/float/bool/array/object), array-of-objects pluck/find/filter. 기존 hexa_json_parse (TAG_MAP) + dict_keys + has_key 만 조합 — runtime.c 무변경 (tier2 ceremony 회피, Step 5 codegen flip race 회피). probe bench/snapshots/json_object_helpers.hexa 에서 interp + AOT 둘 다 PASS. commit 826f3305.

entries.title: ROI 개선 10건 — hexa-lang 공통 엔진 병목 제안
entries.done_note: triage: docs/anima_roi_triage_20260424.md, 0/10 split (body payload 부재 — prompt_ref 없음; re-submit 대기. #6/#8/#9 후보 식별, #9 는 #28 에 중복, #5 는 #27 충돌). 2026-04-24 agent B implementation pass: items #2 / #4 / #6 addressed against tool/roadmap_progress_check.hexa — (#2) shared _emit_witness_with_dedup helper refactor (commit 6df47b1d), (#6) --meta-fp default-on + --no-meta-fp opt-out (commit a2586e76), (#4) mtime+head_sha keyed output cache with --no-cache bypass (commit f093e57b). Verified on /tmp/hxa-test 10-entry dummy fixture: 464ms miss → 128ms hit, [CACHE-HIT mtime=<X> head=<Y>] marker printed. Runtime stat(1) shell dep noted (no hexa_full.hexa touch — agent A scope). 2026-04-24 agent C implementation pass: items #5 / #8 / #9 addressed — (#5) tool/roadmap_schema_lint.hexa new file, required-field validator for checkpoint/phase/roadmap blocks with --format human|summary|jsonl, commit 807aafe2 (smoke: nexus/.roadmap 12 entries LINT-OK); (#8) tool/install_roadmap_hooks.hexa self-verify-after-write — dry-runs installed pre-commit hook with COMMIT_EDITMSG_PATH=/dev/null, greps bootstrap-collapse markers (command not found / exit=127), probes roadmap_progress_check.hexa schema tag; [INSTALL-FAIL] + exit 2 on miss; commit 886f5a9e (smoke: 3/3 repos installed+verified); (#9) tool/roadmap_watcher.hexa NEXUS_WATCHER_GRACE_SEC mtime-based fresh-edit grace (default 30s, max 600s) — skips chflags uchg restore when .roadmap mtime within window and emits [SKIP-FRESH-EDIT mtime=<X>] breadcrumb; commit b3a8d859 (smoke: touch + grace=60s → skip fired, uchg NOT re-applied). 2026-04-24 agent D seed pass: item #10 (integration test suite) — tests/integration/ scaffold with 10 tests + run_all.sh driver (60s per-test timeout) + fixtures/ (mini_roadmap.txt / mini_inventory.json / mini_trigger_watchlist.jsonl / mini_roadmap_v2.json, each <2KB) + README.md. Tests cover proposal_archive --help (hxa-006 guard), cross_repo_floor_check / roadmap_progress_check / proposal_inbox selftests, args.len() + to_i64 regression probes, roadmap_schema_adapter to-flat on v2 fixture (hxa-007 hang guard, bounded 30s wall-clock), dormancy_wake_tick fire+bus+flip end-to-end in NEXUS sandbox, plus two exec_argv / json_parse_roundtrip probes flagged DEPENDS agent A #1/#3. First run: 10/10 PASS (exec_argv + json_parse probes pass opportunistically on current ./hexa build — they stay in the suite as forward guards). No git-hook wiring — run explicit via `bash tests/integration/run_all.sh`. 2026-04-24 agent E (interpreter pass) — items #1 / #3 / #7 addressed against self/hexa_full.hexa (stage0 interpreter SSOT) and self/runtime.c. (#1) exec_argv(argv)/exec_argv_with_status(argv) new builtins — direct fork/execvp (no /bin/sh -c), bypasses shell metachar escaping. Implementation: self/native/exec_argv_sha256.c new file (~330 LOC, pure libc fork/execvp + FIPS 180-4 sha256), TAG_FN shims hx_exec_argv / hx_exec_argv_with_status / hx_sha256 / hx_sha256_file registered via _hexa_init_exec_sha_fn_shims (called from runtime.c _hexa_init_fn_shims). call_builtin dispatch in hexa_full.hexa at ~line 10239-10307. Smoke: exec_argv(["python3","-c","import json; print(json.dumps({'k':'v$weird'}))"]) → literal `{"k": "v$weird"}` (no $ expansion); exec_argv_with_status exit 7 captured correctly. (#3) json_to_val strict-JSON upgrade at hexa_full.hexa ~line 17140-17256 — full escape coverage (\" \\ \/ \b \f \n \r \t \uXXXX), proper int/float distinction via `.`/`e`/`E` in number token, new json_unescape + json_hex4_to_int helpers. Scope-down: kept the existing top-level split-and-recurse structure; did NOT rewrite to full recursive-descent (avoided deeper interpreter refactor for ~2h budget — surrogate pairs / array-of-non-ASCII-keys deferred). Smoke: read_file(state/proposals/inventory.json) (35025 bytes) parse+stringify round-trips with semantic preservation, umbrella key present; json_parse("42") tagged int, json_parse("3.14")+json_parse("1e3") tagged float; \u00e9 round-trips as UTF-8 é. (#7) sha256(s)/sha256_file(path) new builtins — FIPS 180-4 reference implementation (same self/native/exec_argv_sha256.c, ~100 LOC pure C, no OpenSSL/CommonCrypto dep). Smoke: sha256("abc")=ba7816bf8f01cfea414140de5dae2223b00361a396177a9cb410ff61f20015ad (matches shasum -a 256 reference), sha256("")=e3b0c442…b855 matches empty-string reference, sha256_file(tmp) matches shasum -a 256 of the file. Touched files: self/native/exec_argv_sha256.c (new, ~330 LOC), self/runtime.c (2 hunks: fwd decl at _fn_shims_ready block + include block + init call), self/hexa_full.hexa (2 hunks: 4 new call_builtin branches at ~line 10239, json_to_val rewrite + 2 new helpers at ~line 17140). Rebuild: ./build/hexa_stage0 tool/build_stage0.hexa → build/hexa_stage0.real (2741856 bytes, smoke OK) + .real copied to build/hexa_stage0 (after chflags nouchg) with ad-hoc codesign. 10/10 items now addressed across 5 agent passes.

entries.title: hexa 런타임 ARGS_VOID + to_i64 누락 — proposal_archive.hexa / dormancy_wake_tick.hexa 블로킹
entries.done_note: Interpreter SSOT fix in self/hexa_full.hexa (stage0 path). (1) `args` top-level global now pre-bound via env_define at interpret() init (after FnDecl pre-reg, ~line 18102-18126): layout = [script_path, user_args...] — skips the [driver, driver] 2-prefix that hexa_set_args dup-inserts, matching the roadmap 65 / M3 real_args() semantics. Call-form `args()` still resolves via call_builtin (unchanged, line ~10374). (2) `to_i64` added as alias of `to_int` in both call_builtin fast-path (~line 9930) and secondary path (~line 13372), with permissive fallback — empty/garbage input returns 0 instead of exec_throw (matches task spec for try/catch wrapper sites in dormancy_wake_tick.hexa line 130/141/148/230). Rebuild: Y — `./build/hexa_stage0 tool/build_stage0.hexa` regenerated build/hexa_stage0.real (2724080 bytes, smoke OK) + `.real` copied to build/hexa_stage0 (after chflags nouchg) with ad-hoc codesign. Smoke tests PASS — proposal_archive.hexa --help prints usage; dormancy_wake_tick.hexa emits fired=1 dormancy_wake_fire for blowup_dormancy_wake (elapsed=124h >= 72h) on first run, fired=0 on subsequent runs (idempotent state flip). Touched files: self/hexa_full.hexa (3 hunks: to_int/to_i64 fast-path at ~line 9930-9985, secondary at ~line 13372-13432, args env_define at ~line 18102-18126). No commit — working tree left for user review per task directive.

_meta.convention_loss_free_roi: All ROI-category proposals must use 무손실 (loss-free) semantics — no regression, no user-visible break. Category tag: `loss_free_roi`.

convention_cross_repo_blocker.rule: 다른 repo 의 작업을 blocking 하는 entry 는 priority ≥ 95 (0순위)

sub_categories.lang_gap: hexa-lang 언어/runtime 제약 → 모든 downstream repo blocker (rfind 미구현, reserved keyword 등)
sub_categories.resource_gap: 자원 (compute/network/disk/auth/host availability) 제약 → heavy compute offload blocker. airgenome 주 관심사 (Hetzner/runpod/3-host/Linux binary 등)
sub_categories.infra_gap: 인프라 설정 (plist/systemd/docker/rule) 제약 → deploy path blocker
sub_categories.atlas_gap: nexus / n6 atlas map / derivation chain 제약 → paper/product claim blocker
sub_categories.data_gap: anima cert / weight / checkpoint 제약 → training resume blocker
